title: Subscriptions
description: A saved-search alert definition — a standing query the librarian agent periodically matches against new articles to raise alerts.

name.description: the subscription's display name shown in Subscriptions

query.description: the saved-search match criteria (tags/keywords/filters) used to test new articles

cadence.description: 'daily' or 'weekly' — how often the scan-subscriptions job runs this subscription

channel.description: 'alert' (in-app alert) or 'digest' (fold matches into the next digest) — where matches surface

active.description: whether the librarian currently scans for this subscription

lastRunAt.description: when this subscription was last scanned for matches

alerts.description: the alerts this subscription has raised
